Interface DRIDataType<U, T extends U>

All Superinterfaces:
Serializable
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractDataType, BigDecimalType, BigIntegerType, BooleanType, ByteType, CharacterType, DateDayType, DateMonthType, DateType, DateYearToFractionType, DateYearToHourType, DateYearToMinuteType, DateYearToMonthType, DateYearToSecondType, DateYearType, DoubleType, DRDataType, FloatType, IntegerType, ListType, LongType, NumberType, PercentageType, ShortType, StringType, TimeHourToFractionType, TimeHourToMinuteType, TimeHourToSecondType
public interface DRIDataType<U, T extends U> extends Serializable

DRIDataType interface.

Ricardo Mariaca
